title: Better Spears
description: Make your spear look less like a shovel while keeping the Vanilla feel.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb3f2cb6d089740a23c2207b73b7729c60b1541e.png)

# Better Spears

This Resource Pack makes the new spears look less like a spade or shovel and more like an actual spear. Some people have the same issue with the vanilla texture as I do, so I decided to upload this "fix".

![Spear Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8abc86ab30244765c4b468278e54c575f40f58d0.png)

This resourcepack adjusts the regular item texture as well as the texture of a spear when held in hand. It is also compatible with 3D spear texturepacks that do not change the GUI texture, like for example [Nioums 3D Spear](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-spear). This will only change the GUI texture while using a custom model in hand.

![Spear in 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc46b684b91631a20d4ddfbc53ac83490f721f71.png)

## Issues

If there _somehow_ are any issues with this very lightweight pack, or you have any recommendations please open an issue on the [github repository](https://github.com/mzntori/toris-mc-resourcepacks).
